Subject: Cannot connect to VPN
Body: User is unable to connect to the company VPN from home. Error message: connection timeout.
Answer: Check firewall settings and ensure VPN client is updated to latest version. Try reinstalling the VPN client.

Subject: Login error on Chrome browser
Body: User gets error 403 when trying to login using Chrome. Works fine on Firefox.
Answer: Clear Chrome cache and cookies. Disable browser extensions. Try incognito mode.

Subject: Outlook not syncing emails
Body: Emails are not syncing in Outlook. Last sync was 2 days ago.
Answer: Repair the Outlook profile, check internet connection, and ensure mailbox is not full.
